faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: We answer the most frequently asked questions about AI automation and our services.
faq.ctaTitle: Have more questions? We will gladly help!

questions.question: Is AI automation safe for my company?
questions.answer: Yes, security is our priority. We apply the highest data protection standards, end-to-end encryption and GDPR compliance. Before implementation, we conduct a security audit of your systems.

questions.question: How long does AI automation implementation take?
questions.answer: Implementation time depends on the complexity of the process. Simple automations can be implemented within 1-2 weeks. More advanced solutions, such as dedicated AI agents or integrations with enterprise systems, typically take 4-8 weeks.

questions.question: Do I need AI experience?
questions.answer: Absolutely not. Our team handles all the technical side. You focus on your business. We also offer training for your team so you can fully leverage AI capabilities.

questions.question: What companies can benefit from AI automation?
questions.answer: Our solutions are aimed at companies of all sizes - from small businesses to large corporations. We match the technologies and scale of automation to your needs and budget.

questions.question: Can I integrate AI with my existing systems?
questions.answer: Yes, we have experience integrating with most popular business systems, such as CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot), ERP systems, e-commerce platforms, project management tools and many more.

questions.question: How much can I save with AI automation?
questions.answer: Typical savings are 30-70% of time spent on repetitive tasks. This depends on the nature of your processes. We conduct a free analysis to estimate potential savings for your company.

questions.question: Do you offer AI training for teams?
questions.answer: Yes, we conduct training at various levels of expertise - from AI basics for beginners to advanced workshops for technical teams. Training can be conducted online or in-person.

questions.question: What is the cost of AI automation?
questions.answer: Cost depends on the scope and complexity of the project. We offer flexible cooperation models: one-time projects, team augmentation or a standing retainer. Contact us to receive a free quote.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Inoxie was born from a passion for technology and a desire to help companies in digital transformation. We combine years of experience in programming with the latest achievements in artificial intelligence to deliver solutions that really impact our clients' business results.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: Democratizing AI in business. We want every company, regardless of size, to be able to use the possibilities that artificial intelligence offers. We enable companies to focus on what is most important - business development - while we take over the burden of automation and process optimization.
